hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "${f##*.}" in php) vendor/bin/rector process "$f" --no-progress-bar 2>/dev/null | grep -vE '^$|WARNING.*Skipped rule';; md|yml|json|html) npx -q prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null;; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "${f##*.}" in php) vendor/bin/phpstan analyse "$f" --no-progress --error-format=raw 2>/dev/null | head -20;; esac; }
